cmd: sed -i "/def to_dict(self) -> dict:/i \\n    @property\\n    def total(self) -> float:\\n        """Total after discounts."""\\n        if self.discount_percent > 0:\\n            return round(self.subtotal * (1 - self.discount_percent / 100), 2)\\n        return self.subtotal" /app/cart.py

awk '/def to_dict(self) -> dict:/ { print; print "    @property"; print "    def total(self) -> float:"; print "        """Total after discounts.""""; print "        if self.discount_percent > 0:"; print "            return round(self.subtotal * (1 - self.discount_percent / 100), 2)"; print "        return self.subtotal"; next } 1' /app/cart.py > /tmp/cart.py && mv /tmp/cart.py /app/cart.py
